parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ passphrase: $env.BRAND_STUDIO_PASSPHRASE, generation_id: $json.generation_id, user_id: $json.user_id, status: 'complete', videos: $json.videos, video_count: $json.video_count, errors: $json.errors }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ passphrase: $env.BRAND_STUDIO_PASSPHRASE, generation_id: $json.generation_id, user_id: $json.user_id, status: 'failed', error_message: ($json.errors || []).map(e => `[${e.index}] ${e.error}`).join('; ') || 'All variations failed' }) }}
